title: dombeya reginae
intro: Dombeya reginae, also known as the Queen of the Mountains, is a tropical plant species native to the forests of East Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Its extracts have been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory issues. Traditionally, Dombeya reginae is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to treat wounds and skin conditions.
